comment: CapyCook harness move script — a versioned INSTRUMENT, not data (it contains no labels, no benchmark seeds, no telemetry). Pinned at T1: its SHA is recorded in the T1 amendment entry (PREREGISTRATION §9) and any change bumps `version` with a dated CHANGELOG.md entry. Every benchmark seed runs these N=5 moves identically per arm through the real orchestrator (spec §7 scripted arm runner) under the auto-accept policy: each proposal is gated with verb=accept (first card), deterministic moves may auto-advance under the dial, and a safety block or failed move aborts the seed's run.

moves.steer: swap the harshest allium for something milder
the last version needed more brightness at the finish
